zh.lifeSummary: Agnes de Gresley是Ralph Gresley ,Lord of Gresley And Muschamp和Isabella Muschamp的女兒，於大約1196年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾格亞斯利。她於1228年與Lord Hugh FitzRalph結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1265年在英國越可爾英格曼東普享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes de Gresley是Ralph Gresley ,Lord of Gresley And Muschamp和Isabella Muschamp的女儿，于大约1196年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾格亞斯利。她于1228年与Lord Hugh FitzRalph结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1265年在英国越可爾英格曼東普享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gresley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Greasley
meanings: 1  English: locative name, usually from Greasley (Notts) but possibly also from Gresley (Derbys). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2), particularly the Lancs examples.

2 Norman, English: nickname, either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’. In early forms, the nickname has sometimes been confused with the place-name in (1). Compare Le Gresley in Jersey and Greslé, Grêlé in France.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes de Gresley was born about 1196, in Greasley, Nottinghamshire, England as the daughter of Ralph Gresley ,Lord of Gresley And Muschamp and Isabella Muschamp. She married Lord Hugh FitzRalph in 1228. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1265, in Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes de Gresley est née environ 1196, à Greasley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, fille de Ralph Gresley ,Lord of Gresley And Muschamp et Isabella Muschamp. Elle a épousé Lord Hugh FitzRalph en 1228. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1265, à Ingmanthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes de Gresley wurde um 1196 in Greasley, Nottinghamshire, England, als Tochter von Ralph Gresley ,Lord of Gresley And Muschamp und Isabella Muschamp geboren. Sie hat 1228 Lord Hugh FitzRalph geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1265 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes de Gresley è nata il circa 1196 nel Greasley, Nottinghamshire, England come figlia di Ralph Gresley ,Lord of Gresley And Muschamp e Isabella Muschamp. Lei sposato Lord Hugh FitzRalph nel 1228. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1265, nel Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Gresleyは約1196年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアグレアスリーでRalph Gresley ,Lord of Gresley And MuschampとIsabella Muschampの娘として生まれた。1228年にLord Hugh FitzRalphと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1265年にイギリスヨークシュアイアイングマンソルペで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Gresley(은)는 대략 1196년 영국 노틴그함실르 그리슬리에서 Ralph Gresley ,Lord of Gresley And Muschamp(와)과 Isabella Muschamp의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1228년 Lord Hugh FitzRalph(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1265년 영국 요르크실르 잉먼소에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes de Gresley nasceu aproximadamente 1196, em Greasley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra filha de Ralph Gresley ,Lord of Gresley And Muschamp e Isabella Muschamp. Ela casou-se com Lord Hugh FitzRalph em 1228. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1265, em Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes de Gresley родилась около 1196 г. в местности грисли, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Ralph Gresley ,Lord of Gresley And Muschamp и Isabella Muschamp. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Hugh FitzRalph в 1228 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1265 г. в местности ингмантаурп, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes de Gresley nació aproximadamente 1196, en Greasley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra como hija de Ralph Gresley ,Lord of Gresley And Muschamp y Isabella Muschamp. Se casó con Lord Hugh FitzRalph en 1228. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1265, en Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
